description: 7 features connecting ACD to the business goals orchestration system

features.name: acd_get_goals MCP tool: reads /Users/isaiahdupree/Documents/Software/business-goals.json and returns revenue targets, growth targets, weekly_targets, next_actions, agents_in_flight, offers

acd_update_goals MCP tool: accepts { path, value } to deep-set a field in business-goals.json (e.g. path='revenue.current_monthly_usd', value=2500) and writes updated file back with _updated timestamp
acd_orchestrate MCP tool: reads business-goals.json + live ACD agent status + service health and returns ranked action plan (array of { rank, action, skill, reason, expected_impact })
POST /api/goals route in backend: accepts { path, value } to update business-goals.json, broadcasts goal_updated SSE event to dashboard clients
GET /api/goals route in backend: returns full business-goals.json content plus computed gap analysis (revenue_gap, contacts_gap, pct_to_targets per metric)

Goals tab in dashboard UI (index.html + app.js): shows revenue progress bar (current vs target), weekly target completion checklist, agents_in_flight list with status badges, next_actions list, and an Update Goal form

Orchestration tab in dashboard UI: shows ranked action plan from acd_orchestrate, each action card has title/skill/reason/impact, a Run button that dispatches the skill via POST /api/dispatch, and live status via SSE
